docket_entries.description: ORDER PLTFF'S REQUEST TO APPEAR FOR TRIAL BY TELEPHONE "DENIED". OTHER: PLTFF MAY REQUEST CONTINUANCE OF HEARING IF NECESSARY TO ACCOMODATE HIS TRAVEL PLANS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-07-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOFFMAN, JOSEPH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,495.00 FILED BY TIEN, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT HOFFMAN, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2010 BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIEN, CHARLES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOFFMAN, JOSEPH THE AMOUNT DAMAGES BEYOND REASONABLE WEAR AND TEAR, THAT WAS EXTABLISHED AT TRIAL, DID NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT OF DEFENDANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
